Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia, via Zoom, for Theresa Hoskins-Ford, Trustee.

Ms. Navia reports that due to an oversight, the Inventory & Appraisal, all cash assets, was not filed but advises that it will be filed shortly and requests a short continuance.

The matter is continued to Aug-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported
